app.title: SMAP
app.notFoundText: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: This page hit an unexpected error. You can retry, or navigate elsewhere.

idle.title: Are you still there?
idle.message: You've been inactive for a while. For your security, you'll be signed out automatically.
idle.signedOut: You were signed out due to inactivity.

landing.headline: Smart {highlight} Platform
landing.subtitle: Compose, orchestrate, and chat with multi-LLM agent groups, all on infrastructure you control.
landing.authedSubtitle: Jump back into a recent chatroom, or head into your workspace.
landing.authedSubtitleEmpty: Head into your workspace to start chatting with your ai agent groups.
landing.selfHostNote: No billing, no lock-in. SMAP never sees your provider keys in plaintext.

compose.title: Compose
compose.desc: Build ai agents from any provider and group them into collaborative teams.

orchestrate.title: Orchestrate
orchestrate.desc: Design multi-step workflows visually and run them with full observability.

chat.title: Chat
chat.desc: Talk to your agent groups in real time with streaming, RAG, and tools.

landing.footerTagline: Your keys. Your infrastructure. Your ai agents.
landing.metaDescription: Self-hosted platform to compose, orchestrate, and chat with multi-LLM agent groups. Bring your own provider keys.
